title: Claude Message
description: Schema for Anthropic Claude Messages API request and response objects including messages, content blocks, and usage tracking.

CreateMessageRequest.title: Create Message Request
CreateMessageRequest.description: Request body for creating a new message with Claude.

model.description: The model that will complete your prompt. See the list of available models.

max_tokens.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate before stopping. Different models support different maximum values.

messages.description: Input messages with alternating user and assistant conversational turns. Maximum 100,000 messages per request.

system.description: System prompt providing context and instructions to Claude. Can be a string or array of text content blocks.

temperature.description: Amount of randomness injected into the response. Use closer to 0.0 for analytical tasks, closer to 1.0 for creative tasks.

top_p.description: Use nucleus sampling. Recommended to use either temperature or top_p, but not both.

top_k.description: Only sample from the top K options for each subsequent token.

stop_sequences.description: Custom text sequences that will cause the model to stop generating.

stream.description: Whether to incrementally stream the response using server-sent events.

tools.description: Definitions of tools that the model may use.

service_tier.description: Service tier to use for this request.

id.description: Unique object identifier for the message.

type.description: Object type. Always 'message' for message responses.

role.description: Conversational role of the generated message. Always 'assistant'.

content.description: Content generated by the model. Array of content blocks.

model.description: The model that handled the request.

stop_reason.description: The reason the model stopped generating tokens.

stop_sequence.description: The stop sequence that caused the model to stop, if applicable.

MessageParam.title: Message Parameter
MessageParam.description: An input message in the conversation.

role.description: The role of the message author.

content.description: The content of the message. Can be a string or array of content blocks.

ResponseContentBlock.title: Response Content Block
ResponseContentBlock.description: A content block in a message response from Claude.

RequestContentBlock.title: Request Content Block
RequestContentBlock.description: A content block in a message request.

TextBlock.title: Text Block
TextBlock.description: A text content block in a response.

citations.description: Citations for the text content, if any.

TextBlockParam.title: Text Block Parameter
TextBlockParam.description: A text content block in a request.

ImageBlockParam.title: Image Block Parameter
ImageBlockParam.description: An image content block supporting base64-encoded or URL-referenced images.

media_type.description: The media type of the image.

data.description: Base64-encoded image data. Required when type is base64.

url.description: URL of the image. Required when type is url.

DocumentBlockParam.title: Document Block Parameter
DocumentBlockParam.description: A document content block for PDFs and text documents.

ToolUseBlock.title: Tool Use Block
ToolUseBlock.description: A tool use content block in a response indicating the model wants to invoke a tool.

id.description: A unique identifier for this tool use block.

name.description: The name of the tool being used.

input.description: The input passed to the tool, conforming to the tool's input_schema.

ToolUseBlockParam.title: Tool Use Block Parameter
ToolUseBlockParam.description: A tool use content block in a request for multi-turn tool use conversations.

id.description: The unique identifier for this tool use.

ToolResultBlockParam.title: Tool Result Block Parameter
ToolResultBlockParam.description: A tool result content block providing the output from a tool invocation.

tool_use_id.description: The id of the tool use request this is a result for.

content.description: The result of the tool call. Can be a string or array of content blocks.

is_error.description: Set to true if the tool execution resulted in an error.

ThinkingBlock.title: Thinking Block
ThinkingBlock.description: A thinking content block showing Claude's internal reasoning process.

signature.description: A signature verifying the thinking block.

ThinkingBlockParam.title: Thinking Block Parameter
ThinkingBlockParam.description: A thinking content block in a request for multi-turn with extended thinking.

thinking.description: The thinking text from a previous response.

signature.description: The signature from the previous thinking block.

ToolDefinition.title: Tool Definition
ToolDefinition.description: Definition of a tool that the model can use.

name.description: The name of the tool. Must match ^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,64}$.

description.description: A detailed description of what the tool does, when it should be used, and what each parameter means.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema object defining the expected parameters for the tool.

type.description: The type of tool. Omit for custom tools. Use specific type identifiers for server tools.

ToolChoice.title: Tool Choice
ToolChoice.description: How the model should use the provided tools.

name.description: The name of the specific tool to use. Required when type is 'tool'.

disable_parallel_tool_use.description: Whether to disable parallel tool use.

type.description: Whether thinking is enabled, disabled, or adaptive.

budget_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens for thinking. Minimum 1024 and must be less than max_tokens.

schema.description: JSON Schema defining the expected output structure.

CacheControl.title: Cache Control
CacheControl.description: Cache control settings for prompt caching. Creates cost-saving cache breakpoints for reusable context.

Metadata.title: Metadata
Metadata.description: Request metadata for tracking and abuse prevention.

user_id.description: An external identifier for the user making the request. Should be a UUID, hash, or other opaque identifier.

Usage.title: Usage
Usage.description: Token usage information for the request.

input_tokens.description: The number of input tokens consumed.

output_tokens.description: The number of output tokens generated.

cache_creation_input_tokens.description: The number of input tokens used to create a cache entry.

cache_read_input_tokens.description: The number of input tokens read from cache.

TokenCount.title: Token Count
TokenCount.description: Response from the count tokens endpoint.

input_tokens.description: The total number of input tokens in the message.

type.description: Object type. Always 'model' for model objects.

display_name.description: A human-readable name for the model.

created_at.description: RFC 3339 datetime string representing when the model was released.

Error.title: Error
Error.description: An error response from the Anthropic API.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
